beef.name: Beef
beef.description: A rich protein that gives bibimbap a savory, hearty base.

pork.name: Pork
pork.description: A savory meat ingredient that works well with rice and spicy seasoning.

tartare.name: Yukhoe
tartare.description: Korean-style beef tartare with a clean, rich flavor.

chipotle.name: Chipotle Meat
chipotle.description: A smoky, spicy meat option for a fusion bibimbap bowl.

salmon.name: Salmon
salmon.description: A tender fish with a rich texture and bright color.

salmonegg.name: Salmon Roe
salmonegg.description: Briny salmon roe that adds pop and seafood depth.

tuna.name: Tuna
tuna.description: A firm seafood ingredient used in rice bowls and fresh toppings.

shrimp.name: Shrimp
shrimp.description: A sweet shellfish ingredient with a clean, springy bite.

uni.name: Uni
uni.description: Creamy sea urchin with a deep ocean flavor.

gosari.name: Gosari
gosari.description: Bracken fern shoots with an earthy flavor, often seasoned as namul.

spinach.name: Spinach
spinach.description: A green vegetable often blanched and seasoned with sesame oil.

lentinus.name: Shiitake
lentinus.description: A mushroom with deep umami and a firm bite.

pleurotus.name: Oyster Mushroom
pleurotus.description: A soft mushroom that absorbs seasoning and broth well.

kimchi.name: Kimchi
kimchi.description: Fermented cabbage with spicy, tangy depth.

radish.name: Radish
radish.description: A crisp Korean radish ingredient with a clean, refreshing bite.

corn.name: Corn
corn.description: Sweet kernels that add color and a gentle pop.

greenpea.name: Green Pea
greenpea.description: Small green peas with a mild sweetness.

tofu.name: Tofu
tofu.description: A mild soy protein that balances stronger seasonings.

avocado.name: Avocado
avocado.description: A creamy fruit that adds richness to modern rice bowls.

olive.name: Olive
olive.description: A briny fruit topping for a fusion-style bowl.

pineapple.name: Pineapple
pineapple.description: A tropical fruit that adds juicy sweetness.

macaroni.name: Macaroni
macaroni.description: A soft pasta ingredient for a playful fusion texture.
